About Workshops Book

This Saturday,
Make something
with your hands.

AT AN ARTIST'S ATELIER IN AMSTERDAM

Small groups · Practicing artists · Every Saturday

View workshops

About

169b is a creative workshop space in Jordaan, Amsterdam, run by two practicing artists. We also curate and host workshops led by fellow artists at different locations across the city. Everyone is welcome — come as you are, leave having made something or seen the city through an artist's eyes.

Location Atelier is located in Jordaan, Amsterdam — Exact address will be shared upon booking confirmation.

Saturday & Sunday

Saturday 10:00 – 12:30

Read Korean in a day

Learn how to read Korean characters and write your name in Korean. Perfect for beginners. All materials included.

€30 4–6 persons · 2.5h

Saturday 12:40 – 15:10

Korean Calligraphy

Traditional ink calligraphy with brush on hanji paper. All materials included.

€55 4–6 persons · 2.5h

Saturday 15:20 – 17:20

Flower Drawing at the Atelier

Draw flowers with a practicing artist in our Amsterdam atelier. All materials included.

€30 4–6 persons · 2h

Sunday 14:00 – 17:00

Amsterdam Art Gallery Tour

Explore Amsterdam's art scene with a practicing artist. Visit galleries, discover works, and see the city through an artist's eyes — no experience needed.

€25 Up to 8 persons · 3h
